info.name: Internal Process Types API
info.description:
API collection for Internal Process Types (أنواع الإجراءات الداخلية).

**Base URL:** `{{url}}/api/v1`
**Auth:** Bearer `{{token}}`
**Tenant:** `X-Company-Id: {{company_id}}` (if tenancy middleware is enabled)

**Response envelope (BasePackage `Json`):**
```json
{
  "code": "SUCCESS_WITH_SINGLE_PAYLOAD_OBJECT" | "SUCCESS_WITH_LIST_PAYLOAD_OBJECTS",
  "message": "...",
  "pagination": { "current_page": 1, "last_page": 1, "per_page": 15, "total": 1 },
  "payload": { ... } | [ ... ]
}
```

**Settings keys (same for all entity_type):**
- `allow_during_shift` (bool)
- `allow_outside_shift` (bool)
- `allow_on_holidays` (bool)
- `apply_to_all_branches` (bool)
- `max_duration_hours` (integer|null, 1-24)

item.name: 1. Admin — Internal Process Types
item.description: CRUD for admin panel. Types are scoped to the current company (tenant).

request.description: Paginated list of internal process types for admin.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Create a new internal process type. Admin writes name + conditions manually.

response.name: 201 Created (200 envelope)

request.description: Partial update supported. Settings merge with existing values.

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: 2. Mobile — Dropdown List
item.description: Active types only, for employee app dropdown when creating a task.

request.description: Returns only `is_active = true` types, ordered by sort_order then name.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "code": "SUCCESS_WITH_LIST_PAYLOAD_OBJECTS",
  "message": "Internal process types retrieved successfully",
  "payload": [
    {
      "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
      "entity_type": "employee_task",
      "name": "صيانة كهربائية",
      "is_active": true,
      "sort_order": 0,
      "settings": {
        "allow_during_shift": true,
        "allow_outside_shift": false,
        "allow_on_holidays": false,
        "apply_to_all_branches": true,
        "max_duration_hours": 8
      },
      "created_at": "2026-06-14 10:00:00",
      "updated_at": "2026-06-14 10:00:00"
    },
    {
      "id": "b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f12345678901",
      "entity_type": "employee_task",
      "name": "فحص أمني",
      "is_active": true,
      "sort_order": 1,
      "settings": {
        "allow_during_shift": true,
        "allow_outside_shift": true,
        "allow_on_holidays": true,
        "apply_to_all_branches": true,
        "max_duration_hours": 4
      },
      "created_at": "2026-06-14 10:05:00",
      "updated_at": "2026-06-14 10:05:00"
    }
  ]
}

response.name: 422 Missing entity_type

item.name: 3. Employee Task — Use Type on Create
item.description: Pass selected type when creating a task request.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "فحص نظام الإنذار",
  "description": "فحص أجهزة الإنذار في المبنى A",
  "internal_process_type_id": "{{internal_process_type_id}}",
  "duration_hours": 4,
  "task_date": "2026-06-15",
  "task_latitude": 24.7136,
  "task_longitude": 46.6753,
  "project_id": null,
  "approval_responsible_id": null,
  "assignment_responsible_id": null,
  "notes": null
}

request.description: `internal_process_type_id` is optional (nullable). Must exist in `internal_process_types` table.

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: 4. Procedure Setting Types (Workflow)
item.description: New procedure types for separate employee-task actions. Configure steps via ProcedureSetting API.

request.description:
**Procedure type values:**
- `employee_task_request` — طلب مهمة
- `employee_task_extension` — تمديد مدة
- `employee_task_completion_approval` — اعتماد إتمام
- `client_request` — طلب عميل

Seed defaults:
`php artisan db:seed --class=Modules\\ProcedureSetting\\Database\\Seeders\\EmployeeTaskWorkflowSeeder`
`php artisan db:seed --class=Modules\\ProcedureSetting\\Database\\Seeders\\ClientRequestWorkflowSeeder`
